values_hierarchy.md ordering: (1) constitutional integrity/protocol safety, (2) treasury stewardship/downside protection, (3) evidence quality, (4) public-benefit ecosystem growth — exactly as stated.
Treasury doctrine explicitly rejects FCFS and adopts the rolling-window Net Change Limit framework.

First clause is near-verbatim from values_hierarchy.md; the second clause is a fair paraphrase of the doctrine's hard gate (incomplete diligence → NEEDS_MORE_INFO) plus the requirement that the published rationale always name outstanding evidence.

verification.summary: All 29 dossier facts are supported by the source material. Every number, address, key, signature, quote, and named entity was checked against the on-chain metadata, on-chain context block, doctrine text, and verbatim anchor document; no contradictions and no invented specifics (figures, names, dates, or commitments) were found. Zero material discrepancies.
